search.query: `cisco_dc_n9k_index` sourcetype=cisco:dc:nexus9k | lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device AS device OUTPUT hostname AS hostname1 | lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device_without_port as device OUTPUT hostname as hostname2 | eval hostname = coalesce(hostname1, hostname2) | eval hostAndHostname = hostname."(".device.")" | stats values(device) as Device by hostAndHostname | fields hostAndHostname Device | sort 0 hostAndHostname

`cisco_dc_n9k_index` sourcetype=cisco:dc:nexus9k component=nxneighbor | lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device AS device OUTPUT hostname AS hostname1 | lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device_without_port as device OUTPUT hostname as hostname2 | eval hostname = coalesce(hostname1, hostname2) | stats latest(hostname) as "Local Device-ID" values(v4mgmtaddr) as "Remote Device" values(device_id) as "Remote Device-ID" values(capability) as "Remote Device Capabilities" values(platform_id) as "Remote Device Platform" values(port_id) as port_id latest(ttl) as "Remote Device Holdtime(sec)" by device,intf_id | rename device as Device | search Device= $multiTokenQuery$ |rename Device as "Local Device" intf_id as "Remote Interface" port_id as "Local Interface"| fields "Local Device","Local Device-ID","Local Interface","Remote Device","Remote Device-ID","Remote Interface","Remote Device Platform","Remote Device Capabilities","Remote Device Holdtime(sec)"
